Worried About Hair Fall or Hair Thinning?
Let’s Help You Control Hair Loss and Improve Hair Growth.

If you are noticing increased hair fall, thinning hair or receding hairline, early treatment can help control hair loss and improve hair density.

Book Consultation WhatsApp Us

Hair Fall Can Be Stressful — But You Don’t Have to Ignore It

If you are seeing more hair on your pillow, in the shower or while combing, you are not alone. Many men and women experience hair fall and hair thinning, but most people delay treatment until hair density reduces significantly. The earlier you start treatment, the better the chances of controlling hair fall and maintaining hair density.

We First Find the Cause of Your Hair Loss

When you come for consultation, we first examine your scalp, hair density, pattern of hair loss and medical history. Hair loss treatment is different for each person depending on the cause.

Some patients need medical treatment, some need PRP therapy and some need both. The treatment plan is decided based on your hair loss pattern and stage of hair thinning.
